summary: The canonical public command selects the legacy two-action plan when action-profile is omitted, contradicting the documented autonomous default.

findings.detail: The exact public command with until pr-ready and autonomy guarded returns legacy instead of the autonomous seven-action DAG.
Existing dry-run regression expects legacy for omitted action-profile and therefore preserves the broken public default.

inspection.summary: Inspected the public CLI path and ran the exact documented dry-run with and without an explicit profile; omitted profile produced legacy while explicit autonomous produced seven actions.

judgment_delta: CLI composition appeared covered -> block after the exact documented command proved null option normalization selects legacy and existing tests codify it.
